name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or engineering improvement for JACA
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user or engineering problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want.

## Why this fits JACA

Explain how the proposal fits the repo's constraints:

- one canonical codepath
- backend-owned semantics
- no fallback behavior
- no unnecessary surface-area growth

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider?
